item.name: Azeyma's Sleeve
item.description:
Many artist's impressions of Azeyma depict Her with flowing, bell-adorned sleeves, not unlike the elegant silhouette of this wavekin.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Its beautiful trailing fins are said to conjure images of the sun goddess's flowing robes. Catching one is believed to bring great fortune, provided that it is immediately returned to the waves. Failure to do so will conversely result in the angler and seven generations of their offspring being horribly cursed.
